The Covenant (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $23,364,784Details
International Box Office $14,800,000
Worldwide Box Office $38,164,784
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $27,591,321
Total $27,591,321
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,852,458 (37.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.64 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:61.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,681 opening theaters/2,681 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $40,344,376

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 8th, 2006 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: January 2nd, 2007 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence and action, some disturbing images, sexual content, partial nudity and language
Running Time: 97 minutes
Plot point: Adopted Family Seeking Reunion, Family Secrets, Kidnap, New Guy/Girl in School, Rescue, Romance, Secret Magic, Witches
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lakeshore Entertainment, Screen Gems, Sandstorm Films, Spacedog
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
